build_system: dotnet CLI with solution file at src/CdkBase.sln. CDK synth via 'npx cdk synth'.
test_framework: xUnit with CDK Assertions (Amazon.CDK.Assertions from Amazon.CDK.Lib). Tests in src/CdkBase.Tests/CdkBaseStackTest.cs.
build_command: export PATH="/root/.dotnet:$PATH" && unset NODE_OPTIONS && cd /projects/sandbox/cdk-sleep-csharp-kiro && dotnet build src/CdkBase.sln
test_command: export PATH="/root/.dotnet:$PATH" && unset NODE_OPTIONS && cd /projects/sandbox/cdk-sleep-csharp-kiro && dotnet test src/CdkBase.sln --verbosity normal
verification_instructions: 1. Run dotnet build src/CdkBase.sln to confirm compilation. 2. Run dotnet test src/CdkBase.sln --verbosity normal to confirm all tests pass. 3. Run npx cdk synth to confirm CloudFormation template synthesis succeeds.
setup_instructions: 1. Install .NET 8 SDK: curl -sSL https://dot.net/v1/dotnet-install.sh | bash /dev/stdin --channel 8.0 --install-dir /root/.dotnet. 2. Export PATH=/root/.dotnet:$PATH. 3. Unset NODE_OPTIONS (sandbox has a preload that breaks JSII). 4. Run dotnet restore src/CdkBase.sln.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode. .NET 8 SDK installed at /root/.dotnet. NODE_OPTIONS must be unset for JSII/CDK to work (sandbox sets --require for a non-existent proxy-bootstrap.js). Node.js v22 available via nvm.
contribution_requirements: Strict TDD: write failing tests first, then implement minimal code. Use L2 constructs. Apply least-privilege IAM. Update docs/ARCHITECTURE.md after changes. Use conventional commits.
key_patterns: Stack class in CdkBaseStack.cs. Tests use Template.FromStack(stack) then HasResourceProperties/FindResources/ResourceCountIs. State machine uses Chain.Start().Next() pattern with AddCatch for error handling. DynamoPutItem/DynamoUpdateItem for DynamoDB integration. CustomState for Polly SDK integration. Tests use JsonSerializer to inspect serialized resources.
directory_structure: src/CdkBase/ - main CDK stack code. src/CdkBase.Tests/ - xUnit test project. docs/ - architecture and guidelines documentation. .github/workflows/ci.yml - CI pipeline.
